summary: Iteration 77 - REDD+ MRV Features Testing Complete. All backend APIs (12/12 tests passed) and frontend features verified successfully. REDD+ practices guide, MRV dashboard, USSD 12-question flow with REDD+ scoring all working correctly.

ui_bugs.issue: Hardcoded '22' practices count instead of '21' - FIXED

critical_code_review_comments: PASS: GET /api/redd/practices returns 5 categories with total_practices=21
PASS: GET /api/redd/mrv/summary returns aggregated REDD+ data with practices_adoption and redd_level_distribution
PASS: GET /api/redd/mrv/farmers returns farmer list with redd_score and redd_level fields
PASS: POST /api/ussd/callback detailed estimation has 12 questions (Q1/12 to Q12/12)
PASS: USSD questions 10-12 are REDD+ questions (biochar, zero_deforestation, reboisement)
PASS: USSD result includes both 'Niveau ARS' and 'Niveau REDD+' lines
PASS: Frontend /guide-redd page loads with 5 expandable categories and practices
PASS: Frontend /guide-redd has 'Calculer ma prime' CTA button (data-testid='redd-cta-calculator')
PASS: Frontend /guide-redd has 'Dashboard MRV' button for admin/coop users (data-testid='redd-cta-mrv')
PASS: Frontend /cooperative/mrv page loads with KPI cards, practice adoption bars, REDD distribution, and farmer table
PASS: Frontend /cooperative/dashboard has 'MRV REDD+ / Pratiques' quick action button (data-testid='quick-action-mrv-redd')
PASS: Admin login with identifier field returns access_token
FIXED: REDDGuidePage practices count changed from hardcoded '22' to '21' to match API
seed_data_creation: Test data exists in ars_farmer_data collection (1 farmer from USSD flow)
context_for_next_testing_agent: REDD+ MRV features fully functional. Backend APIs at /api/redd/practices, /api/redd/mrv/summary, /api/redd/mrv/farmers work correctly. Frontend pages /guide-redd and /cooperative/mrv load with all expected elements. USSD detailed estimation now has 12 questions (9 original + 3 REDD+: biochar, zero_deforestation, reboisement). USSD result shows both ARS and REDD+ levels. Cooperative dashboard has MRV quick action button.

mocked_api_note.Orange Money API: MOCKED - payments logged but not actually processed
mocked_api_note.Orange SMS API: MOCKED - SMS logged but not sent

backend_apis.GET /api/redd/mrv/summary: Returns total_farmers, total_hectares, total_arbres, avg_score_carbone, avg_score_redd, practices_adoption, redd_level_distribution
backend_apis.GET /api/redd/mrv/farmers: Returns farmers list with redd_score, redd_level, practices fields
backend_apis.POST /api/ussd/callback: Detailed estimation has 12 questions, result includes Niveau REDD+

/guide-redd.title: Pratiques REDD+ Reconnues
/guide-redd.stats: 5 Categories, 21 Pratiques, 60k FCFA/ha max, 10/10 Score max
/guide-redd.expandable_practices: Working - shows practices with score bonuses and FCFA/ha

/cooperative/mrv.title: Dashboard MRV REDD+
/cooperative/mrv.subtitle: Monitoring, Rapportage, Verification
/cooperative/mrv.practices_adoption: Progress bars for Agroforesterie, Compostage, Couverture vegetale, Zero brulage, Sans engrais
/cooperative/mrv.redd_distribution: Excellence, Avance, Intermediaire, Debutant, Non conforme
/cooperative/mrv.farmers_table: Shows farmer name, phone, Ha, Arbres, Carbone, REDD+, ARS, Pratiques
